title: Revision: Single molecule RNA Sequencing Reveals IFNy-induced Differential Expression of Immune Escape Genes in MCC Cell lines
author: Adrian Weich
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Revision for draft "Single molecule RNA Sequencing Reveals IFNy-induced Differential Expression of Immune Escape Genes in MCC Cell lines ". 

 Includes data and code to reproduce the figure of HLA expression in the three tested cell lines and Nanopore Pipeline to quantify cell line-specific HLA expression.
steps_raw:
Revision for draft "Single molecule RNA Sequencing Reveals IFNy-induced Differential Expression of Immune Escape Genes in MCC Cell lines ".
